---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for FraudLens
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of the problem. Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen, including:
- What the feature should do
- How users would interact with it
- Any relevant API or configuration changes

## Alternative Solutions

What alternatives have you considered?

## Impact

- **Who would benefit:** (e.g., fraud analysts, API consumers, maintainers)
- **Complexity:** (low / medium / high)
- **Breaking changes?** (yes / no / don't know)

## Additional Context

- Any relevant ADRs, discussions, or prior art
- Mockups or diagrams (if applicable)
- References to similar features in other projects

## Would you be willing to contribute?

Yes / No / Maybe (with guidance)
